description: Deployment plan proposal emitted by DeploymentPlanningCell (phase 2) and consumed by ConstructionOrchestrationCell (phase 3, leaderNode joseph). Bundles UNSPSC procurement sub-graph + Giemon robot fleet assignment + Council Lv6+ sign-off requirements. Per ADR-2605201400 §7: first deployment site requires ≥3 Council Lv6+ signatures.

surveyId.description: Survey this plan is derived from.

unispscProcurementBundleCid.description: IPFS CID of the UNSPSC procurement sub-graph bundle (per ADR-2605171300). Lists all commodity codes + quantities for the deployment.

giemonFleetAssignment.description: Giemon Otete robot DIDs assigned to the deployment (per `20-actors/kuni-umi/CLAUDE.md` phasing gate: ≥1 unit with valid Ed25519 key required).

councilSignatures.description: G3 + ADR-2605201400 §7: ≥3 Council Lv6+ sign-offs required for first deployment. Each councilLevel MUST be ≥ 6.

robotDid.description: DID of the form `did:web:etzhayyim.com:kuniumi:robot:<serial>` per CLAUDE.md.

councilLevel.description: Council level. ADR-2605201400 §7 requires Lv6+ for deployment sign-off.
